Flow.label: 【課題ヒアリング（見積作成/発注形態）】

start.filterFormula: (ISNEW()&& ( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.maker1__c}))|| NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.maker2__c}))|| NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.maker3__c}))|| NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.main_vendor1__c}))|| NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.main_vendor2__c}))|| NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.main_vendor3__c}))|| NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.PrincipalSuppliersShare1__c}))|| NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.PrincipalSuppliersShare2__c}))|| NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.PrincipalSuppliersShare3__c}))|| NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.JU_ShareReason1__c})))|| NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.JU_ShareReason2__c})))|| NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.JU_ShareReason3__c}))) )) || ( ISCHANGED({!$Record.maker1__c})|| ISCHANGED({!$Record.maker2__c})|| ISCHANGED({!$Record.maker3__c})|| ISCHANGED({!$Record.main_vendor1__c})|| ISCHANGED({!$Record.main_vendor2__c})|| ISCHANGED({!$Record.main_vendor3__c})|| ISCHANGED({!$Record.PrincipalSuppliersShare1__c})|| ISCHANGED({!$Record.PrincipalSuppliersShare2__c})|| ISCHANGED({!$Record.PrincipalSuppliersShare3__c})|| ISCHANGED({!$Record.JU_ShareReason1__c})|| ISCHANGED({!$Record.JU_ShareReason2__c})|| ISCHANGED({!$Record.JU_ShareReason3__c}) )
